title: Qwerty's Quickies
description:
Qwerty's Quickes is an adult comedy typing survival gameA fast paced typing game were the player is a streaker surviving as long as possible while the supermarket security attempts to capture them. Type the words above the guards' heads to protect your streak for the highscore. You have two chances to escape the security guards that captured them but get captured three times and its a gameover. 

Features• Fast paced typing gameplay

• Adjustable difficulty and presets

• Female and Male character selection

• Editable word list

• Word text size, colors and outline settings

• Performance/Graphical/Audio settings

• Three bonus minigames. Additional minigames are planned for future updates.
description_short: Want to type longer and harder in the bedroom? Look no further than Qwerty's Quickies! An adult comedy typing survival game. Type to survive as security chases the streaker through aisles of a busy supermarket. See how long you last in Qwerty's Quickies. Including minigames with more coming soon.
